decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which matches on all identity fields: same street (Webster Avenue), same borough (Bronx), same limits (The Hub to Williamsbridge), same description (based on the existing Bx41 route), and the observation's source_id 2013_02_sbs_webster_bx_cb4 is already listed in that record's source_ids. No different registry record is a closer match; corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012 and corridor_webster-avenue-bronx-2012 lack specific limits, and corridor_webster-avenue-sbs has different limits (Harlem River to The Hub). The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Based on the existing Bx41 route that carries over 20,000 daily riders ■ 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge
